title: VimFu — [z ]z Fold Start End
description: [z moves to the start of the current open fold. ]z moves to the end. Navigate within a fold's boundaries.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with a class

setup.content:
class Castle:
    def gate(self):
        locked = True
        key = "golden"
        return locked
    def tower(self):
        height = 50
        guards = 3
        return guards
    def dungeon(self):
        prisoners = 5
        escape = False
        return escape
    def throne(self):
        king = "Arthur"
        crown = True
        return crown

setup.comment: Launch nvim with indent folds, open level 1

steps.say: Open bracket Z moves to the start of the current fold. Close bracket Z moves to the end.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump to fold start with [z ---

steps.say: We're inside the Castle class fold. The methods are visible. Move to the middle and try open bracket Z.
Jumped to the start of the class body. Line two.

steps.comment: --- Demo 2: jump to fold end with ]z ---

steps.say: Close bracket Z goes to the end.
Jumped to the last line of the fold. The fold boundary.
And back to the start again.
Open bracket Z and close bracket Z. Jump to the start and end of the current fold.
